auth.label: Pro API Key
auth.description: CoinMarketCap Pro API key used with the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY header. Sign up at https://pro.coinmarketcap.com to receive it, as documented at https://coinmarketcap.com/api/documentation/.

actions.name: convert_price
actions.description: Convert an asset amount into another fiat or cryptocurrency using CoinMarketCap pricing.

amount.description: Amount of the source asset to convert.

id.description: CoinMarketCap ID of the source asset.

symbol.description: Ticker symbol of the source asset.

convert.description: Target currency symbol used for conversion.

convert_id.description: CoinMarketCap ID of the target currency used instead of convert.

time.description: Historical timestamp or date to use for conversion, when supported by the API plan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting one asset amount into another currency. Exactly one of id or symbol is required.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

id.description: CoinMarketCap identifier of the source asset.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of the price used for conversion.

price.description: Converted value for the requested amount.

quote.description: Mapping of target currency to converted quote.

outputSchema.description: Price conversion response returned by CoinMarketCap.

actions.name: get_cryptocurrency_map
actions.description: Retrieve CoinMarketCap asset IDs, symbols, and slugs for cryptocurrency discovery.

id.description: Comma-separated CoinMarketCap asset IDs to filter by.

listing_status.description: Comma-separated listing statuses to include, such as active or inactive.

slug.description: Comma-separated asset slugs to filter by.

symbol.description: Comma-separated asset symbols to filter by.

aux.description: Comma-separated auxiliary fields to include, such as platform or first_historical_data.

sort.description: Field used to sort the response.

start.description: 1-based offset of the first item to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of assets to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving CoinMarketCap asset mappings.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

anyOf.description: Current market capitalization rank.

is_active.description: Whether the asset is active, using CoinMarketCap flags.

first_historical_data.description: Timestamp of the first available historical data point.

last_historical_data.description: Timestamp of the last available historical data point.

token_address.description: Token contract address on the platform.

anyOf.description: Parent platform information for a token.

items.description: One asset returned by the CoinMarketCap map endpoint.

data.description: Ordered list of CoinMarketCap asset mappings.

outputSchema.description: Asset mapping response returned by CoinMarketCap.

actions.name: get_key_info
actions.description: Retrieve plan limits and usage details for the current CoinMarketCap API key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving API key information.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

credit_limit_monthly.description: Monthly credit limit available to the API key.

credit_limit_monthly_reset.description: Human-readable interval until the monthly credit limit resets.

credit_limit_monthly_reset_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the monthly credit limit resets.

rate_limit_minute.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per minute.

credits_used.description: Credits used within the reported period.

credits_left.description: Credits remaining within the reported period.

requests_made.description: Requests already made within the reported minute bucket.

requests_left.description: Requests remaining within the reported minute bucket.

current_minute.description: Usage metrics for one CoinMarketCap billing bucket.

credits_used.description: Credits used within the reported period.

credits_left.description: Credits remaining within the reported period.

requests_made.description: Requests already made within the reported minute bucket.

requests_left.description: Requests remaining within the reported minute bucket.

current_day.description: Usage metrics for one CoinMarketCap billing bucket.

credits_used.description: Credits used within the reported period.

credits_left.description: Credits remaining within the reported period.

requests_made.description: Requests already made within the reported minute bucket.

requests_left.description: Requests remaining within the reported minute bucket.

current_month.description: Usage metrics for one CoinMarketCap billing bucket.

actions.name: get_latest_cryptocurrency_quotes
actions.description: Retrieve the latest quotes for one or more cryptocurrencies by id, symbol, or slug.

id.description: Comma-separated CoinMarketCap asset IDs to query.

convert.description: Comma-separated quote currency symbols to convert into.

convert_id.description: Comma-separated CoinMarketCap IDs of quote currencies to convert into.

skip_invalid.description: Whether invalid identifiers should be silently skipped by CoinMarketCap.

aux.description: Comma-separated auxiliary asset fields to include.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving latest asset quotes. Exactly one of id, symbol, or slug is required.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

num_market_pairs.description: Number of known market pairs for the asset.

anyOf.description: Estimated circulating supply.
Reported total supply.
Reported maximum supply.

date_added.description: Timestamp when the asset was added to CoinMarketCap.

anyOf.description: Classification tags for the asset.

token_address.description: Token contract address on the platform.

anyOf.description: Parent platform information for a token.
Latest converted price.
Rolling 24-hour traded volume.
Percentage change of the 24-hour traded volume.
Percentage price change over the past hour.
Percentage price change over the past 24 hours.
Percentage price change over the past 7 days.
Percentage price change over the past 30 days.
Percentage price change over the past 60 days.
Percentage price change over the past 90 days.
Current market capitalization.
Percentage dominance of the total market capitalization.
Fully diluted market capitalization.
Total value locked when available.
Timestamp of the returned quote.

additionalProperties.description: Converted quote metrics keyed by conversion currency.

quote.description: Mapping of conversion currency to quote metrics.

additionalProperties.description: Latest quote payload for one asset.

data.description: Mapping of requested identifiers to latest asset quotes.

outputSchema.description: Latest quote response returned by CoinMarketCap.

actions.name: get_latest_global_metrics_quotes
actions.description: Retrieve the latest global cryptocurrency market metrics and quote aggregates.

convert.description: Quote currency symbol to convert the metrics into.

convert_id.description: CoinMarketCap quote currency ID used instead of convert.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the latest global market metrics.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

active_cryptocurrencies.description: Number of active cryptocurrencies tracked by CoinMarketCap.

total_cryptocurrencies.description: Total number of cryptocurrencies tracked by CoinMarketCap.

eth_dominance_yesterday.description: Ethereum market cap dominance reported for yesterday.

btc_dominance_yesterday.description: Bitcoin market cap dominance reported for yesterday.

anyOf.description: Latest converted price.
Rolling 24-hour traded volume.
Percentage change of the 24-hour traded volume.
Percentage price change over the past hour.
Percentage price change over the past 24 hours.
Percentage price change over the past 7 days.
Percentage price change over the past 30 days.
Percentage price change over the past 60 days.
Percentage price change over the past 90 days.
Current market capitalization.
Percentage dominance of the total market capitalization.
Fully diluted market capitalization.
Total value locked when available.
Timestamp of the returned quote.

additionalProperties.description: Converted quote metrics keyed by conversion currency.

quote.description: Mapping of conversion currency to quote metrics.

last_updated.description: Timestamp when the global metrics were updated.

outputSchema.description: Latest global market metrics response returned by CoinMarketCap.

actions.name: list_latest_cryptocurrency_listings
actions.description: Retrieve the latest cryptocurrency listings ordered by CoinMarketCap ranking and filters.

start.description: 1-based offset of the first item to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of assets to return.

convert.description: Quote currency symbol to convert the listings into.

convert_id.description: CoinMarketCap quote currency ID used instead of convert.

sort.description: Field used to sort the returned listings.

cryptocurrency_type.description: Asset type filter used by CoinMarketCap.

tag.description: Comma-separated asset tags to filter by.

aux.description: Comma-separated auxiliary asset fields to include.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the latest cryptocurrency listings.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when CoinMarketCap generated the response.

error_code.description: CoinMarketCap error code where 0 indicates success.

anyOf.description: Error message returned by CoinMarketCap, or null when the request succeeded.

elapsed.description: Time spent by CoinMarketCap processing the request.

credit_count.description: API credits consumed by the request.

notice.description: Additional notice returned by CoinMarketCap when present.

num_market_pairs.description: Number of known market pairs for the asset.

anyOf.description: Estimated circulating supply.
Reported total supply.
Reported maximum supply.

date_added.description: Timestamp when the asset was added to CoinMarketCap.

token_address.description: Token contract address on the platform.

anyOf.description: Parent platform information for a token.

additionalProperties.description: Converted quote metrics keyed by conversion currency.

quote.description: Mapping of conversion currency to quote metrics.

items.description: One asset returned by the latest listings endpoint.

outputSchema.description: Latest listings response returned by CoinMarketCap.
